steps.title: Name a specific site
steps.content: The goal is to provide an example of a SNOTEL site, so the answer must name a specific station. The notes identify Bear Trap Meadow as one of the automated snow measurement stations in Wyoming.

steps.title: Reject general facts
steps.content: Choice A describes how SNOTEL data can be used but names no site. Choice C identifies who maintains the stations but gives no example. Choice D describes SNOTEL sites generally throughout Wyoming without naming a specific one. The answer is B.
